name: supercalm
description: Supercalm — a remote operating system to drive CLI coding agents (claude/codex/agy) on a Tailscale node, with a voice/text web console

scripts.test: node test/static_path.test.js && node test/db_guard.test.js && node test/project_graph.test.js && node test/knowledge_assets.test.js && node test/supervisor_spec_files.test.js && node test/supervisor_progressive_scope.test.js && node test/supervisor_doc_lifecycle.test.js && node test/supervisor_awareness_guards.test.js && node test/supervisor_operator_intent.test.js && node test/detect_background.test.js && node test/product_audit.test.js && node test/external_recovery.test.js && node test/operator_requirements.test.js && node test/model_catalog_key.test.js && node test/codex_rollouts.test.js && node test/story_spine.test.js && node test/story_rich.test.js && node test/model_gating.test.js && node test/sidebar_consistency.test.js && node test/ui_render_invariants.test.js && node test/supervisor_on_message.test.js && npm run test:supervisor-architecture && npm run test:supervisor-replay && npm run test:supervisor-doctrine && npm run test:supervisor-send-policy && npm run test:send-kernel && npm run test:event-gate && npm run test:dispatch-guard && npm run test:thrash && npm run test:update-core && npm run test:supervisor-engagement && npm run test:project-memory && npm run test:task-state && npm run test:model-providers && npm run test:pricing && npm run test:phone && npm run test:voice-brief && npm run test:voice-report && node test/session_title.test.js && node test/browser_identity.test.js && node test/preview_profiles.test.js && npm run test:council && npm run test:agui && node test/claude_transcripts.test.js && node test/feedback_survey_gate.test.js && node test/worktrees.test.js && node test/integrations.test.js && node test/integrator.test.js && node test/publisher.test.js && node test/deploy_breaker.test.js && node test/deploy_orchestrator.test.js && node test/deploy_reviewers.test.js
